free_text: Stack of Th and U targets.
The photofission cross sections for  238,240,242Pu  in
energy region  of  5  -  10  MeV were measured at the
bremsstrahlung beams of the  SSC  RF  IPPE  microtron
with energy  step  of  0.05 in a subbarrier range and
with step  of  0.1   MeV   in   upper   region.   The
measurements were  performed  by relative method with
the using of the photofission cross section  of  238U
in case  of  238Pu  and photofission cross section of
237Np in  cases  of  240,242Pu  as  a  cross  section
standard. The  photofission cross section of 237Np as
a standard was used firstly.  The comparison  of  the
cross section  of  240Pu  when  it  is  measured with
The detailed   energy  dependencies  of  photofission
cross sections  with  the  resonance   structure   in
near-barrier region   are   obtained.  The  resonance
structure is   similar   to   the   one   in   energy
dependencies of   fission   probability   for  nuclei
238,240,242Pu in direct reactions.  the components of
the photofission  cross sections through the channels
with the quantum numbers J-PI K = 1- 0, 1- 1 and 2+ 0
were calculated.   A   distinguished   role   of  the
quadrupole photofission cross section was observed in
energy region below 5.5 MeV. The theoretical analysis
of the   experimental   data    in    one-dimensional
double-humped-barrier models   permits   to  get  the
barrier parameters for 238,240,242Pu.  The results of
the present research were compared with data obtained
Data were compiled at the  Russia  MSU  INP  CDFE  by
